subject: Pearly -> Seaworthy: please re-route Clouded + Zephyrous to useful work
body: Owner direction: for now, please re-direct my quality-gate team to other useful work. Clouded completed PR 108 open-issues triage; Zephyrous completed PR 108 duplication triage. Current quality-gate lane is waiting on marshal/director route for committing the remaining TUI fix and pushing the unpushed Sonar fixes, so Clouded + Zephyrous no longer need to idle under my sub-team. Please re-route Clouded Streaming Airstream and Zephyrous Darting Aerie to any useful work you want advanced. I will retain aggregate quality-gate status and respond if the commit/push/reanalysis path needs follow-up.
